Europe’s chip equipment company to US: Don’t blame us for China getting the technology
description: Europe's top chip equipment maker, ASML, has refuted US claims that its advanced EUV machines have reached China. The Dutch firm insists it has never shipped such technology to the country, nor any components specifically designed for them. This statement follows US concerns about China potentially acquiring EUV capabilities despite export restrictions. ASML maintains full compliance with Dutch and European export regulations.

description: Pop sensation Olivia Rodrigo is set to make a grand entrance into Fortnite, with her collaboration officially confirmed.  Fans caught a glimpse of her upcoming Icon Series skin, inspired by her latest album, through a social media story.  The highly anticipated cosmetic bundle, featuring an outfit, back bling, and more, is expected to launch with Fortnite Festival Season 15 around July 29, 2026, likely priced around 2,500 V-Bucks.

After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn, makes 540 workers millionaires
description: A small-town US family has sold their Louisiana-based electrical-equipment company Fibrebond to power-management giant Eaton for $1.7 billion—and made sure their 540 full-time workers got a $240 million cut of it. Former CEO Graham Walker wrote a single clause into the deal: 15% of proceeds for the staff, none of whom held any equity. The average bonus works out to around $443,000 per worker.

UK telecom giants roll out 'kill switch' to block stolen phones from working: How it works
description: UK mobile giants Virgin Media O2 and VodafoneThree have activated a new 'kill switch' for new phones stolen from their stores, aiming to cripple the black market for stolen devices. This move follows resistance from major manufacturers like Apple and Samsung to a universal anti-theft lock. The technology renders stolen, unsold handsets unusable remotely, a measure previously seen in the Netherlands.

Brazil fan tries Rocky Balboa ‘curse’ to derail Lionel Messi’s World Cup dream
description: A Brazil fan sparked online buzz after placing Lionel Messi's Argentina jersey on Philadelphia's Rocky Balboa statue, a tradition believed by some rival supporters to jinx opponents. The stunt came as Argentina prepares to face Austria after Messi's historic hat trick against Algeria. Meanwhile, Brazil climbed to the top of Group C with a 3-0 win over Haiti and will next face Scotland in the FIFA World Cup.

title: Taylor Swift and Blake Lively’s friendship faces strain ahead of wedding
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained privacy even though they are pretty public about their high profile relationship for the last three years. While both of them have remained publicly distant from Blake Lively, it seems Taylor Swift’s friendship with her had taken a dramatic turn, just a few weeks ago as the pop star now gears up to finally get married.
